meta_title: For Freelancers: user onboarding to Solve no portfolio (Advanced Idea List)
meta_description: Learn how to user onboarding and overcome no portfolio. A Advanced-level Idea List using Antigravity and Claude Code.

content.seo_title: For Freelancers: User Onboarding to Solve No Portfolio
content.seo_description: Learn how to build high-converting user onboarding to overcome a lack of portfolio. An advanced-level guide using Antigravity and Claude Code for freelancers.
content.answer_block: To overcome a lack of portfolio, build a high-fidelity, interactive user onboarding experience. This showcases your ability to solve complex UX challenges, reduces user friction, and proves your technical proficiency. By deploying a polished, API-driven onboarding flow, you demonstrate the exact value proposition clients pay top-tier freelancers to deliver.
content.intro:
The blank screen of a portfolio is the freelancer’s silent killer. Clients don't just buy code; they buy the confidence that you can guide their users from arrival to activation. When you lack a deep history of shipped products, your ability to architect a seamless onboarding flow becomes your most potent marketing asset.

We are moving beyond simple splash screens. By leveraging Antigravity for rapid scaffolding and Claude Code for iterative refinement, you will build a sophisticated, data-driven onboarding system that mirrors enterprise-grade SaaS. This isn't just a project; it's a demonstration of your architectural maturity.

steps.title: Define the User Journey Map
steps.description: Map out the critical path from signup to the 'Aha!' moment. Focus on reducing cognitive load and highlighting core product value.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate a React-based onboarding wizard component structure that uses a state machine to track progress across 4 distinct steps: Welcome, Value Prop, Feature Tour, and Success state.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'create onboarding state machine with xstate and tailwind css styles'

steps.title: Build the Interactive Tour
steps.description: Implement a non-intrusive, context-aware tooltip system that guides users through your simulated SaaS interface.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Build a reusable Tooltip component using Framer Motion for smooth transitions, triggered by state changes in the onboarding wizard.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'refactor onboarding steps to include framer motion animations for slide transitions'

steps.title: Integrate Data Persistence
steps.description: Ensure onboarding progress is saved to a backend so users can resume if they disconnect.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Create a Supabase integration hook that saves onboarding progress to the user profile table in real-time.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'add supabase integration to track onboarding completion status'

steps.title: Add Contextual Validation
steps.description: Implement real-time form validation within the onboarding flow to prevent user errors before they happen.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Construct a Zod-based validation schema for the onboarding inputs and display inline error messages using a consistent UI pattern.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'apply zod validation to onboarding form fields with clear error messaging'

steps.title: Deploy for Demonstration
steps.description: Package the onboarding flow as a standalone demo module that you can link to in your portfolio.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Configure a Vercel-ready build script for this onboarding module, ensuring it is isolated from the main app logic for easy embedding.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'export onboarding module as a standalone micro-frontend for portfolio embedding'

pro_tips: Always include a 'Skip' button; forcing users through onboarding creates resentment, not conversion.
Use micro-animations to signify progress; the brain perceives movement as progress, reducing churn.
Implement A/B testing variables from day one to show potential clients you think in terms of conversion metrics.
Ensure your code is modular; if you build a great onboarding component, you can resell it as a white-label asset.
Use 'Empty States' within your onboarding to teach users how to populate their dashboard before they even see it.
content.next_steps: Once deployed, record a 60-second Loom video demonstrating the flow, explain the technical decisions behind your state management, and embed it directly onto your portfolio landing page.
content.conversion_block: Stop waiting for the perfect client to find you and start building the proof they are looking for. Ready to build? Join our AI Builder community → Start your first project today.
